final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing character portrait for an ancient Chinese-style game splash art.

Style/medium: needs a "神秘东方风格" and "仙气十足" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 court-lady portraiture tradition, 敦煌飞天 mural painting heritage, contemporary Chinese fantasy game splash art (e.g., 剑网三 / 天涯明月刀 visual lineage); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include flowing robes (衣袂飘飘) as a key visual element
Subject: must include a woman in 汉服 playing a stringed instrument (抚琴)
Scene/backdrop: must include a bamboo forest (竹林) with moonlight filtering through leaves
Lighting/mood: needs a moonlit night atmosphere with dappled light (斑驳光影) — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the ethereal "仙气" quality suitable for game splash art
Avoid:
